summary: Solid TypeScript implementation with good type safety and modularity, but critical gaps undermine deliverable completeness. Workflow uses error suppression antipattern (|| true on lines validating JSON/Markdown output) that masks failures. Test harness references fixtures/secrets.json, fixtures/all-ok.json, and expects 13 unit tests via bun test, but none are provided—workflow will fail at runtime. yaml-parser.ts adds external Python dependency (yaml module). Action pinning incomplete: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 should specify full semver. Script files (types, validator, formatter, main) are well-structured and type-safe; validator logic is correct. Without fixture files and unit test sources, deliverable cannot execute.
